title: Electra plans an $850M Ohio factory for its ultra-short hybrid plane
summary: Aircraft startup Electra plans to invest around $850 million to build a factory in Ohio, giving the maker of hybrid-electric ultra-short takeoff and landing aircraft its first dedicated production base.
caption: output/2026-07-21/electra-plans-an-850m-ohio-factory-for-its-ultra-short-hybrid-plane.txt
